author: tfthacker
description: Advanced text tools for working with text in your vault.

name: Text Transporter

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
- New: DNPTOMORROW for templating. Outstanding code contribution (https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-text-transporter/pull/65). Thank you @bwydoogh.
- Updated project dependencies and updated to the latest esbuild process
releases.name: 1.0.4 New Template varaible DNPTOMORROW

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
Fixes:
- Problem with Quick Capture not working if there isn't an open document
- Fixed images in README.md
releases.name: 1.0.3 Quick Capture Fix

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
- Copy block embed as alias will now handle multiple blocks (Thanks @BrianBarry, Issue 18)
- Major code refactoring to clean it up for shipping
releases.name: 1.0.2 Release

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New
- All commands can now be configured to show up in the context menu, not just those designed for the editor. (Thanks @gitmurf)

Fix:
- Copy block Embeds - if was a header with colon, colon was transferred, bu then the embed fails to render in obsidian
- Fixed how links to other files are generated for the copy block ref command along with send file link to commands
releases.name: 1.0.1 More control in settings for context menu features

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
0.8 Beta release of "Obsidian42 - Text Transporter"

Hold on to your saddles.. major code refactoring and features. So I expect the need for a quick 8.1 release with bug fixes. But the stuff here is just to darn good to hold back from you crazy testers. 

New
- SUPER ALPHA: Support for tag based file and block search. Just run a command, and select either tag file search or tag block search, and you can then navigate your vault with tags. This is very experimental, not even sure where it will go or what value it offers. but its a starting point. (Thanks dpthomas87)
- Quick Capture supports resolving tags and file names. Not perfect implementation, but it works.  (Thanks @murf) credits to @Chhrriissyy#6548 for suggestor code. Awesome stuff. thank you.
- Bookmarks can now be configured to add "Copy to" and "Paste to" context menu in editor and all commands list as found in the ribbon button
    - Add a * to the beginning of the line to indicate that a context menu command should be made for this bookmark
    - Example:
      - *directory/myfile.md#TOP
- "Send link of current note" command added. It will send the current file in edit mode as a link into another file. (Thanks  @Kevin Murray)
- "Select line" commanded enhanced to be "Select current line/expand to block" Select line will select current line, and if pressed again will expand to the current block (line and blocks are not always the same thing)

Changes
- Consolidated commands CC and ABI into one. (Thanks FelipeRearden ). Will expand on this command as per your issue.
- Some shortcuts where changed, so some hotkeys may not work and need  to be reassigned

Fixes
-  Copy Block ref for blockquotes now works (Thanks PR-C 🐙)
releases.name: 0.8 Beta

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New
- Command Palette commands to manage bookmarks without going into settings screen
    -  Add bookmark from current file/location
    -  Open bookmarked file
    -  Remove a bookmark from the bookmarks colllection
- Settings: Context Menu Toggles: Toggles for each Text Transporter command if they should appear or not in the context menu 
- Settings: Bookmarks documentation  link: Under the description  for bookmarks is a link  to additional documentation and examples for bookmarks

Changes:
- Removed ""--- Today's Daily Notes Page ---" from file suggester, since this can be defined as a bookmark. While one additional step for users, it lets them control if this is seen or not. (Thanks Murf)
- I did some work to the internal command palette commands to plan to make them configurable in settings. this might break any shortcut keys you made to them. Sorry.

Fixes:
- When copy/push to an empty file, no longer fails (Thanks Murf, Kevin Murray#6678)
releases.name: 0.7 Beta

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
0.6.1 Fixes
- Fixed Quick Capture Screen for mobile
- For file suggester, in addition to Ctrl, Shift being modifier keys, added Meta

Building on the 0.6 Beta with these changes:

New:
- Quick Capture from anywhere to anywhere. Check out the new Quick Capture commmand in the Command pallete (Thanks @Murf)
- Support for Daily Note Page bookmarks. Instead of the file name in the bookmark, use DNPTODAY, and the DNP from today's date will be used. (Thanks @Murf)
- If Ctrl+Clicking or pressing Ctrl+Enter on a file in the suggester suggester, the file will be opened after the transport has been performed. 
- If Shift+Clicking or pressing Shift+Enter on a bookmark in the file suggester, instead for completing the transport operation, the suggester will open the file  to the bookmark destination to more specifically select text from the bookmark location. 
- All Commands list available from ribbon button or Comnand Palette now show the shortcut keys for quick access

Changes:
- Changed description of "Copy embeded block reference for this line" to  "Copy embeded block reference for this line" to be more clear (thank you @pseudometa https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-text-transporter/issues/2)
- Renamed in Settings "Alias Indicator" to be "Alias Placeholder" to make purpose more clear. (thank you @pseudometa https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-text-transporter/issues/2)

Fixes:
- If copying or pushing to the TOP of a file, if the file contains YAML, the transport text will be placed after the YAML (Thank you @murf)
- Pull from bookmarked location will pull a line from under the item, not the location marker itself
- All commands list now works even when there is not a file open, only showing commands that work outside of edit mode
releases.name: 0.6.1 Beta

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New:
- Quick Capture from anywhere to anywhere. Check out the new Quick Capture commmand in the Command pallete (Thanks @Murf)
- Support for Daily Note Page bookmarks. Instead of the file name in the bookmark, use DNPTODAY, and the DNP from today's date will be used. (Thanks @Murf)
- If Ctrl+Clicking or pressing Ctrl+Enter on a file in the suggester suggester, the file will be opened after the transport has been performed. 
- If Shift+Clicking or pressing Shift+Enter on a bookmark in the file suggester, instead for completing the transport operation, the suggester will open the file  to the bookmark destination to more specifically select text from the bookmark location. 
- All Commands list available from ribbon button or Comnand Palette now show the shortcut keys for quick access

Changes:
- Changed description of "Copy embeded block reference for this line" to  "Copy embeded block reference for this line" to be more clear (thank you @pseudometa https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-text-transporter/issues/2)
- Renamed in Settings "Alias Indicator" to be "Alias Placeholder" to make purpose more clear. (thank you @pseudometa https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-text-transporter/issues/2)

Fixes:
- If copying or pushing to the TOP of a file, if the file contains YAML, the transport text will be placed after the YAML (Thank you @murf)
- Pull from bookmarked location will pull a line from under the item, not the location marker itself
- All commands list now works even when there is not a file open, only showing commands that work outside of edit mode
releases.name: 0.6 Beta

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New:
- Replace a link with its original text (via context menu or CP All Commands)
- Replace a link with its original text and alias (via context menu or CP All Commands)

Changes:
- There is no longer the "-- bottom of file" since these are already in the suggester (top row in suggester is first row from file, if at top row and press up arrow, suggester wraps to last row in file). This added some friction to quickly navigating the suggester.

Fixes:
- Fixed select next / previous block shortcut accessors (Thanks too: PJJPtx )
- Fixed "Copy embeded block reference" per suggestion (Thanks: chrisgrieser) via: https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-text-transporter/issues/2
- Fixed Fuzzy search in suggester to actually do fuzzy search (Thanks: gitmurf)
releases.name: 0.5 beta

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New features:
- Bookmark support in the file suggester. User can bookmark files that are frequently used, and optionally define if they work with the top or bottom of document, or some internal location (great for push/pull between frequently used docs)
-  context menu commands can be turned off in settings

Improvements:
- file suggester is now working smoother. Provides access to DNP, recently used files, bookmarked files.
- perf enhancements
- reduced number of context menu commands

Fixes:
- lots of bug fixes
- had lots of console.logging - sorry about that
releases.name: 0.4 beta

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New:
- New Icon
- Commands:
  - Select block - Next  - selects the next block from the current cursor location
  - Select block - Previous - selects the previous block from the current cursor location
- The plugin now recognizes list items as block items (just as Obsidian does).  So block references can be generated  from a list item, task, paragraph and heading

Fixes:
- Performance on selecting a file from the file finder
- Many internal code fixes
- Block references to headings broke the link if the heading contained special characters like [, ] or #
releases.name: 0.3 Alpha

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description:
New Feature:
+ Copy block ref as an alias
+ Alias indicator can be defined in settings
+ Added all available Text Transporter commands to the command palette
+ New Settings screen to enable if Text Transporter commands should appear in the Ribbon (On by default)

Enhancements:
+ Cosmetic improvements: icons and clarified the text in the description of commands
releases.name: 0.2 Alpha

releases.author: TfTHacker
releases.description: This is my experimental release of Text Transporter. Makes moving text around your vault much easier, as well as working with block refs.
releases.name: alpha - experimental
